title: jigg pieces v0.1
description: Piece geometry and canonical solved positions. Authoritative source for piece count, die-line shapes, and solved layout.

id.description: Stable identifier, unique within the puzzle.

path.description: SVG path data in absolute image pixel coordinates. Must be closed (ends with Z). Permitted commands: M, L, C, Q, Z.

canonical.description: Solved position of this piece. Immutable.

x.description: Normalized x position of the piece's bounding box center, relative to image width.

y.description: Normalized y position of the piece's bounding box center, relative to image height.

rotation.description: Degrees [0, 360). Always 0 in a standard solved layout.

metadata.description: Optional implementation-defined data. shapeName is reserved for whimsy piece labels.
